name: Consumable Supply Audit
description: You are a Facilities Coordinator at a university conducting the quarterly consumable supply audit in Snipe-IT (http://localhost:8000, logged in as admin). Add three new consumables to the inventory: "HP 61XL Black Ink Cartridge" (Category: Printer Supplies, Manufacturer: HP, Model No: CH563WN, Order: PO-2025-0892, Qty: 50, Min Qty: 10, Cost: 32.99), "Cat6 Ethernet Cable 10ft" (Category: Cables, Manufacturer: StarTech, Model No: N6PATCH10BL, Order: PO-2025-0893, Qty: 200, Min Qty: 25, Cost: 5.49), and "Logitech USB-A to USB-C Adapter" (Category: Adapters, Manufacturer: Logitech, Model No: 956-000029, Order: PO-2025-0894, Qty: 75, Min Qty: 15, Cost: 8.99). Check out 2 units of the HP ink to John Smith (jsmith) and 3 units of the Cat6 cable to Alice Johnson (ajohnson). Additionally, update the minimum quantity thresholds for existing items "USB-A Flash Drive 32GB" to 20 and "AA Batteries (Pack of 24)" to 30.
